mission_title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1B-1A-R2 — Structured Profile Redaction Repair

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json
checks={
 r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\pc_resource_comparison_v1.py":(43512,"04669d22982315e902abba818c1c2c44a4f622997c9b8346cc0357cf0306fbdc"),
 r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\PC_RESOURCE_COMPARISON_CONTRACT_V1.json":(1502,"1a97abaa271a1c28923c6393d9bf731c1fbe2ae114916837df966157943a1da0"),
 r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\README_V1B1.md":(846,"27f2d91854fb12ea122478cc262bd4bc38b6b5c4d59000f456a571de736f941e"),
}
for name,(size,digest) in checks.items():
 p=Path(name); data=p.read_bytes(); assert len(data)==size,(name,len(data)); assert hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()==digest,name
compile(Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\pc_resource_comparison_v1.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8"),"<v1b1a-collector>","exec")
unchanged={
 r"Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py":"d7bf0a2042d55ef7f0a5869556015e42c7427e7ff88636b28e1795f3adf7b952",
 r"Z:\FOXAI\ui\main_window.py":"a9c5bb86878e5f0cd27d221dbb32688b337e6026073a4b66d83339e0aef294a3",
 r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\self_knowledge_chat_adapter_v1.py":"a80a9047e0eebd9ac87fe4d656c565bc6534563bb3c97e1ad9b59823a36804f7",
 r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\webui_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py":"765983b563f8495138c9670849de5c4703f4735a0ddc9324efd6580606fc517b",
 r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\desktop_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py":"e420706136b4902d82d8dbf1fecc64ae70fb8bc639106db41033545f8c196c30",
 r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\pc_foxai_baseline_v1.py":"8c3af6d6f8d5a21a03fbd5c97eabd58280718a195c65f51a2b9201ff84ec798b",
}
for name,digest in unchanged.items(): assert hashlib.sha256(Path(name).read_bytes()).hexdigest()==digest,name
snap=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\snapshots\ENG-20260722-062243-69C555"); manifests=sorted(snap.glob("snapshot_*.manifest.json")); assert manifests
manifest=json.loads(manifests[-1].read_text(encoding="utf-8")); entries=manifest["entries"]
expected=["System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/PC_RESOURCE_COMPARISON_CONTRACT_V1.json","System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/README_V1B1.md","System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/pc_resource_comparison_v1.py"]
assert len(entries)==3,len(entries)
normalized=sorted(row["relative_path"].replace("\\","/") for row in entries)
assert normalized==expected,(normalized,expected)
assert all(row["existed"] is False and row.get("sha256") is None and row.get("size") is None for row in entries)
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B1A_SUPPORT_SNAPSHOT_AND_ISOLATION_OK")
validations.name: Verify exact V1B-1A support payloads, unchanged integrations, and normalized three-path snapshot

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json,subprocess
p=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\pc_resource_comparison_v1.py")
r=subprocess.run([r"Z:/FOXAI/Runtime/Desktop/python/python.exe","-I","-B","-S",str(p),"self-test"],cwd=r"Z:\FOXAI",capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=45)
assert r.returncode==0,(r.stdout,r.stderr)
obj=json.loads(r.stdout)
assert obj["status"]=="ok" and obj["output_count"]==4
assert obj["precondition_blocking"] is True and obj["qualified_fixture"] is True
assert obj["process_arguments_excluded"] is True and obj["k_path_excluded"] is True
assert obj["structured_profile_redaction"] is True
assert obj["harmless_profile_substring_accepted"] is True
assert obj["profile_diagnostic_field_path_only"] is True
print(json.dumps(obj,sort_keys=True))
validations.name: Run isolated V1B-1A comparison collector self-test
validations.stdout: {"canonical_lf_only": true, "harmless_profile_substring_accepted": true, "k_path_excluded": true, "output_count": 4, "precondition_blocking": true, "privacy_redaction": true, "process_arguments_excluded": true, "profile_diagnostic_field_path_only": true, "qualified_fixture": true, "stable_ids": true, "status": "ok", "structured_profile_redaction": true}

validations.name: Capture qualified minimal-load read-only resource evidence

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-062243-69C555_V1B1A_R2_MINIMAL_LOAD_RESOURCE_BASELINE")
expected=["MINIMAL_LOAD_CAPTURE_RECEIPT.json","MINIMAL_LOAD_PROCESS_SUMMARY.json","MINIMAL_LOAD_QUALIFICATION.json","MINIMAL_LOAD_RESOURCE_SNAPSHOT.json"]
files=sorted(p.name for p in out.iterdir() if p.is_file()); assert files==expected,files
payloads=[]
for name in expected:
 p=out/name; data=p.read_bytes(); assert b"\r" not in data; obj=json.loads(data.decode("utf-8")); canonical=(json.dumps(obj,indent=2,sort_keys=True,ensure_ascii=False)+"\n").encode("utf-8"); assert data==canonical,name; payloads.append(data)
assert sum(map(len,payloads))<8*1024*1024
print(json.dumps({"status":"four_canonical_outputs_verified","count":4,"total_bytes":sum(map(len,payloads))}))
validations.name: Validate exactly four deterministic UTF-8 LF-only evidence outputs

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-062243-69C555_V1B1A_R2_MINIMAL_LOAD_RESOURCE_BASELINE")
q=json.loads((out/"MINIMAL_LOAD_QUALIFICATION.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
p=json.loads((out/"MINIMAL_LOAD_PROCESS_SUMMARY.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert q["status"]=="qualified_minimal_load" and q["blocker_count"]==0 and q["blockers"]==[]
assert q["automatic_process_changes_performed"] is False
presence=p["workload_presence"]
assert presence["llama_server_present"] is False
assert presence["foxai_desktop_pythonw_present"] is False
assert presence["comfyui_listener_8188_present"] is False
assert p["process_arguments_recorded"] is False and p["full_executable_paths_recorded"] is False
assert p["top_working_set_process_count"]<=15 and p["process_table_count"]==len(p["process_table"])
assert p["process_count"]>=p["process_table_count"]
print(json.dumps({"status":"minimal_load_qualification_verified","process_count":p["process_count"]}))

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-062243-69C555_V1B1A_R2_MINIMAL_LOAD_RESOURCE_BASELINE")
s=json.loads((out/"MINIMAL_LOAD_RESOURCE_SNAPSHOT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert s["qualification_status"]=="qualified_minimal_load"
mem=s["memory"]; assert mem["availability_status"]=="available" and mem["total_physical_memory_bytes"]>0 and mem["available_physical_memory_bytes"]>=0
assert 0<=mem["memory_load_percent"]<=100 and mem["page_file_allocated_mib"]>=0 and mem["page_file_current_usage_mib"]>=0
roots={row["drive_root"] for row in s["drives"]}; assert roots=={"C:\\","Z:\\","S:\\"},roots
workspace=s["active_workspace"]; assert workspace["root"]==r"Z:\FOXAI" and workspace["full_tree_hash_performed"] is False
verified=workspace["verified_files"]; assert len(verified)==6 and all(row.get("sha256_matches_expected") is True for row in verified)
hist=s["historical_loaded_state_reference"]; assert hist["mission_id"]=="ENG-20260722-051940-8477D9" and hist["historical_evidence_modified"] is False
assert set(s["known_local_listeners"])=={"8080","8188","8765"}
print(json.dumps({"status":"resource_drive_workspace_coverage_verified","memory_load_percent":mem["memory_load_percent"]}))
validations.name: Validate memory, page-file, drive, listener, workspace, and historical-reference coverage

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-062243-69C555_V1B1A_R2_MINIMAL_LOAD_RESOURCE_BASELINE")
r=json.loads((out/"MINIMAL_LOAD_CAPTURE_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert r["status"]=="captured_and_verified" and r["qualification_status"]=="qualified_minimal_load" and r["output_count"]==4
for key in ("automatic_process_changes_performed","services_changed","startup_items_changed","registry_writes","network_connections_initiated","remote_hosts_probed","packet_capture_performed","models_loaded","comfyui_launched","gui_launched","live_foxai_modules_imported","historical_v1b0_evidence_modified","rollback_drive_k_accessed","personal_documents_inspected","process_arguments_recorded","environment_variable_values_recorded","persistent_device_identifiers_recorded"):
 assert r[key] is False,key
assert r["read_only_collection"] is True and r["deterministic_utf8_lf_serialization"] is True and r["privacy_validation_passed"] is True
assert r["profile_redaction_mode"]=="structured_recursive_field_aware"
assert r["prior_failure_classification"]=="profile_marker_raw_substring_false_positive"
assert r["collector_behavior_changed"] is False
assert len(r["outputs_before_receipt"])==3
unchanged={
 r"Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py":"d7bf0a2042d55ef7f0a5869556015e42c7427e7ff88636b28e1795f3adf7b952",
 r"Z:\FOXAI\ui\main_window.py":"a9c5bb86878e5f0cd27d221dbb32688b337e6026073a4b66d83339e0aef294a3",
 r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\pc_foxai_baseline_v1.py":"8c3af6d6f8d5a21a03fbd5c97eabd58280718a195c65f51a2b9201ff84ec798b",
}
for name,digest in unchanged.items(): assert hashlib.sha256(Path(name).read_bytes()).hexdigest()==digest,name
assert sum(p.stat().st_size for p in out.iterdir() if p.is_file())<8*1024*1024
print(json.dumps({"status":"read_only_receipt_and_boundaries_verified","output_count":4}))
validations.name: Validate read-only receipt, unchanged V1A/V1B-0 baselines, and size ceiling
